name: Contango Ore, Inc.
description: Contango Ore, Inc. is a gold exploration and development company focused on high-grade assets in Alaska. The company's primary asset is its 30% interest in the Manh Choh project, a joint venture with Kinross Gold Corporation, which is one of the highest-grade open-pit gold mines in the world. Contango Ore also holds a 100% interest in the Lucky Shot project and several other exploration properties across Alaska. The company utilizes a unique business model by leveraging existing infrastructure to minimize capital expenditures and accelerate the path to production and cash flow.
